Unit Name: -> Habitat Flats - 72 High St. Reno, NV 89502

Marketing Title: ✨ Habitat Flats – Your Perfect 1-Bedroom Haven ✨ 500 sq. ft. • Comfort • Convenience • Community
Marketing Description:
✨ Habitat Flats – Your Perfect 1-Bedroom Haven ✨
500 sq. ft. • Comfort • Convenience • Community

Welcome to Habitat Flats—where comfort meets convenience in the heart of Reno!

Your spacious 1-bedroom apartment offers 500 sq. ft. of thoughtfully designed living space, perfect for relaxing after a long day or entertaining a friend or two.

Included Amenities:

On-Site Laundry Room – No more hauling baskets across town.

Private Parking Lot – Hassle-free, right outside your door.

Basketball Court & Putting Green – Play, practice, and unwind steps from home.

Centralized Mail Area – Secure and organized.

Gated Community – Peace of mind with added privacy and security.

At Habitat Flats, you’re not just renting an apartment—you’re joining a community that values comfort, safety, and convenience. Whether you’re shooting hoops, perfecting your short game, or simply enjoying your quiet space, this is where you belong.
Amenities: Putting Green, Basketball Court, Laundry Room, Smoking area, Complimentary wifi, Walking distance to downtown, Walking distance to River and Ace ballpark

Marketing Description:
*Offering 3, 6 or 9 month leases.

*One mile to UNR’s campus, The Habitat offers students a private, easy and affordable living experience while attending school.

*Free courtesy wi-fi and all utilities are included. There is also laundry on site, gated entry, parking and completely furnished units. Three month leases are available with an option for a month to month extension upon lease completion!

*This is a recently refurbished building with new everything and a touch of style. Super close to downtown so you can walk to the movie theater, café or the Truckee River.

*Have the best of both worlds, close to campus but far enough away to enjoy peaceful study time. These studios, approximately 250 to 350 square feet have full kitchen options or simply use the microwave and fridge that we provide.

*No application fees, no credit checks, no hidden costs, easy move in and plenty of space to park your car, bike, skateboard or scooter.

Come and see what student living is like at The Habitat. Taking applications now!
Amenities: On-site Laundry, Complimentary wifi, Basketball Court, Putting Green, Canyon Falls, Designated Smoking Area

*Offering 3, 6 or 9 month leases.

*One mile to UNR’s campus, The Habitat offers students a private, easy and affordable living experience while attending school.

*This is a recently refurbished building with new everything and a touch of style. Super close to downtown so you can walk to the movie theater, café or the Truckee River.

Marketing Title: One Bedroom located near Riverwalk District
Marketing Description:
The recently renovated One Forty One in downtown Reno is located just two blocks north of the Truckee River in the River Walk District.

Take a moment to ask us what this location offers! Just one mile south of UNR’s campus, 3 blocks to the downtown cafés, pubs and casinos. This urban Reno community offers 24 polished ‘one bedroom’ ‘junior one bedroom’ or ‘studio’ apartments that will fit your every need.

Windows, windows and more windows provide great views from the second and third floors while the first floor keeps you grounded with all the natural light you need to get through those winter months. The ‘feel safe’ secured lobby entrance to the building provides you with peace of mind for downtown Living. Your only utility is the gas bill…. we cover the rest!

All new ceiling fans… checker board flooring…brand new carpet… all new fixtures…all new paint… brand new appliances… mini balconies and a fresh new feel to the One Forty One makes it the best in downtown living!

Marketing Title: One Bedroom located by Downtown Reno
Marketing Description: 423 Kuenzli Street is located at the bridge on Kuenzli Street you can hear the crowd roar from the Aces baseball stadium. What appears to be a small house is actually 2 separate studios…one up…one down. The fenced backyard almost touches the Truckee River’s south bank and provides room to get a great work out. Newer carpet, paint and fixtures pleases every guest that enters. A full kitchen and bathroom give you everything that you need and a quaint living space makes for a very cozy experience. We cover all of the utilities for you so get busy and start planning a garden, there’s plenty of room.

Tags: small house, yard, fenced yard, house downtown, downtown, reno, full kitchen, river
Marketing Title: Affordable Living Near UNR | River Edge Homes in Reno
Marketing Description:
Near the Aces baseball stadium and downtown attractions, the River Edge homes in Reno are a sweet mix of vintage two bedroom houses, studios and two and four bedroom apartments.

427 Kuenzli is a classic old home built of brick offers interesting rectangular bedrooms and one full bathroom. The living space centers between the two bedrooms so it’s perfect for sleepy time privacy. The kitchen window peers out to the fenced back yard that runs right up to the Riverwalk path. Newer paint, fixtures, carpet and the wall heater sustain the original feel with that modern appeal.

Security Deposit is equal to ‘one month’s rent’. Easy application and No Credit Check. No Smoking indoors.

Marketing Description:
Virginia Flats is a new & completely renovated apartment building completed in 2018 with 55 units tucked into the immediate outskirt of downtown Reno, Nevada. Virginia Flats Reno apartments provide super easy access to the I-80 which quickly gets you to everywhere in the Reno-Sparks valleys.

The Virginia Flats was designed and inspired by the 1950’s mingled with the comforts and needs of today. The building is all brick with contrasting colors of gray, white and black.

30 of the 55 units offered here at the Virginia Flats are micro-units, approximately 218 square feet in size. Just perfect for the eat, sleep and work mentality of Reno’s newest Residents working for Tesla, Panasonic, Renown or other newly rooted companies here in Northern Nevada. These micro units include all of the utilities. Courtesy WiFi is available.

Each unit is furnished with a 49 inch smart TV ready for you to launch your favorite app and other furnishings may be provided upon request.

All other units are of various sizes ranging from junior one bedrooms to lofty studios with vaulted ceilings. These are provided with a 49 inch or a 55 inch smart TV already hung and waiting for you to click and go.

Come and see what the Virginia Flats has to offer for your short or long term living here in the heart of Northern Nevada.

Marketing Title: Affordable Living Near UNR | Washington Heights
Marketing Description:
Washington Heights: Located in downtown Reno, one mile southwest of University of Nevada, Reno (UNR Campus) and only one block from the Truckee River. Washington Heights offers affordable apartments in Reno, totaling 12 one and two bedroom apartment homes in a newly renovated building.
